dataset.name: QMU synthetic document OCR fixture v1
dataset.license: MIT; generated document text, field ground truth, and rendered images are authored for this repository and may be redistributed under the repository license.
dataset.imageDistribution: Images are rendered deterministically at run time from this manifest; no third-party document images are committed.
dataset.realDatasetStatus: No third-party real-image OCR corpus is adopted in this revision. Future real-image datasets must use a manifest plus gitignored fetch/cache path before measurements are published.

normalization.case: preserve for CER/WER; field values use field-specific uppercase/currency/date normalization
normalization.whitespace: collapse runs of whitespace to one ASCII space, trim ends, and normalize line endings before scoring
normalization.punctuation: preserve punctuation for CER/WER; field values strip grouping commas from numeric totals and uppercase currency codes
normalization.scoring: CER and WER divide edit distance by the reference length. Field accuracy is exact normalized-field matches divided by required ground-truth field count.

preprocessing.pageSplitting: One manifest item is rendered as one image/page; multi-page documents are out of scope for this v1 fixture.
preprocessing.rendering: White background, black fixed 5x7 bitmap text, no rotation, no blur, no compression loss.
preprocessing.languageScript: Latin uppercase letters, Arabic numerals, ASCII punctuation, ISO dates, and currency codes. Japanese script is not included in this fixture.
preprocessing.layoutDifficulty: Single-page receipt/form hybrid with headings, aligned labels, tabular item lines, and total fields. Handwriting, stamps, photos, skew, and overlapping columns are out of scope.

schema.description: Required structured extraction fields for each document.
